## Description
<!-- Describe your changes in detail -->

## Related Issue
<!-- Link to the issue this PR resolves (e.g. Closes #12) -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Code style / Refactoring (formatting, renaming, structure cleanups)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore (dependency updates, configuration)

## Bounded Context & Architecture Verification
- [ ] My changes are strictly inside the target module directory (`src/modules/<name>` or `backend/modules/<name>`) or in `shared`.
- [ ] No direct imports across different domain module boundaries have been introduced.
- [ ] If I added AI features, I included a local mock fallback.

## Testing & Quality Check
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` and fixed any warnings/errors.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` locally and it completed successfully.
- [ ] I verified the app functions correctly in the browser.
